examples: Pinocchio, mortified at being taken for a crab, said resentfully: "What nonsense!"
My sister and I listen to and gnash, resentfully to walk home.
With the droughts, wildfires scourge more acreage and people resentfully ration.
GARCIA-NAVARRO: Near the largest freshwater lake in the Galapagos, park ranger Gianni Arizmendi resentfully yanks out a root.
It was a thrill to step out of the bus queue, resentfully observed by ordinary passengers as I turned from frog to princess and stooped to crawl in beside the professor.
